text:
§ 220.00 Controlled substances; definitions.

As used in this article: 1. "Controlled substance" means any substance listed in schedule I, II, III, IV or V of Public Health Law § 3306.

2. "Narcotic drug" means any controlled substance listed in schedule I(b)(1) or II(b)(1) of PHL § 3306.

3. "Sell" means to sell, exchange, give or dispose of to another, or to offer or agree to do the same.

4. "Unlawfully" means in violation of the provisions of Public Health Law § 3302 through § 3399.
